content.content: Save a new recipe to your personal collection.

fields.name: ingredients
fields.label: Ingredients
fields.placeholder: List each ingredient separated by commas

content.content: No recipes yet. Add your first recipe to start building your cookbook!
The app comes pre-loaded with a couple of sample recipes. Add your own to build your collection.

seedData.ingredients: Spaghetti, canned tomatoes, garlic, olive oil, basil, salt, pepper
seedData.instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions. Saute garlic in olive oil, add tomatoes, simmer 15 minutes. Season with salt, pepper, and basil. Toss with drained pasta.

seedData.ingredients: Chicken breast, soy sauce, bell peppers, broccoli, garlic, ginger, rice
seedData.instructions: Slice chicken and vegetables. Stir fry chicken in hot oil until cooked through. Add vegetables and cook 3 minutes. Add soy sauce, garlic, and ginger. Serve over steamed rice.

help.overview: Recipe Book is your personal digital cookbook. Save your favorite recipes with ingredients, instructions, and serving sizes, then browse them anytime you need inspiration.

pages.addRecipePage: Enter the recipe name (required), pick a cuisine from the dropdown, add your ingredients list, step-by-step instructions, and number of servings. Press Save Recipe to add it to your collection.
pages.browseRecipesPage: View all your saved recipes in a table. Click Add New Recipe to expand your collection.

tour.title: Welcome to Recipe Book
tour.content: Build your personal recipe collection right on your device. Save recipes you love and find them whenever you need them.

tour.title: Add Your Recipes
tour.content: Enter a recipe name, pick a cuisine from the dropdown, then add ingredients and instructions. The ingredients and instructions fields expand for longer text. Fields marked with * are required.

tour.title: Browse Your Collection
tour.content: All your saved recipes appear here in one list. The app comes with two sample recipes to get you started.
